title: LuseLUL
body:
This is the modpack used in the survival series **"[Building with Luse](https://www.youtube.com/@LuseLUL)"** on YouTube.

**This modpack contains:**

- Mods for building in Creative mode, such as Axiom and WorldEdit.

- I use Litematica to bring the builds I planned in Creative mode into my survival world.

- Mods that will visually enhance the game, such as Better Clouds and SimpleFog.

- Sodium, Iris, and many other performance mods have been added to maintain the best possible performance.

![Luse 1](https://i.imgur.com/oGiX5SF.png)
